project.title: Enigma-Decentralized-Student-Marketplace
project.scenario: Peer-to-peer student marketplace — mint credits, list items, and escrow payments with on-chain ratings.

tasks.title: Plan Token + Wallet
tasks.desc: Define roles, acceptance criteria, and a sequence diagram for the Token + Wallet slice.

tasks.title: Design EnigCredit.sol
tasks.desc: Sketch data structures, events, and the ERC-20-style interface for EnigCredit.

tasks.title: Implement mint/transfer/approve
tasks.desc: Write mint, transfer, and approve functions in EnigCredit.sol.

tasks.title: Compile EnigCredit.sol
tasks.desc: Run forge build; resolve all compiler errors and warnings.

tasks.title: Revise token logic
tasks.desc: Address code-review feedback; tighten access control and overflow checks.

tasks.title: Deploy EnigCredit to Anvil
tasks.desc: Deploy EnigCredit.sol to a local Anvil testnet; record deployed address.

tasks.title: Test EnigCreditTest
tasks.desc: Write and run EnigCreditTest; all mint/transfer/approve cases must pass.

tasks.title: Document token module
tasks.desc: Complete docs/token-module.md with interface reference and usage examples.

tasks.title: Present Token + Wallet
tasks.desc: Record a 3-minute demo video of the token module and prepare slides.

tasks.title: Plan Listings slice
tasks.desc: Define listing lifecycle, struct fields, and acceptance criteria for the Listings slice.

tasks.title: Design Listing struct
tasks.desc: Design the Listing struct, storage mapping, and event signatures in Marketplace.sol.

tasks.title: Implement createListing/getListing
tasks.desc: Implement createListing, getListing, and totalListings functions.

tasks.title: Compile listings code
tasks.desc: Run forge build; fix any compiler errors in the listings slice.

tasks.title: Revise listings logic
tasks.desc: Apply review feedback; add input validation and duplicate-listing guard.

tasks.title: Deploy Marketplace (listings)
tasks.desc: Deploy Marketplace.sol to Anvil with listings slice active; verify createListing works.

tasks.title: Test ListingsTest
tasks.desc: Write and run ListingsTest; cover happy-path and invalid-seller edge cases.

tasks.title: Document listings module
tasks.desc: Complete docs/listings-module.md with function reference and example calls.

tasks.title: Present Listings slice
tasks.desc: Record a 3-minute demo and prepare slides covering the full listing flow.

tasks.title: Plan Escrow + Ratings
tasks.desc: Map the purchase-to-delivery state machine and define rating criteria for the Escrow slice.

tasks.title: Design escrow state machine
tasks.desc: Design Purchase struct, escrow states, and rateUser storage in Marketplace.sol.

tasks.title: Implement purchaseItem/confirmDelivery/cancelPurchase/rateUser
tasks.desc: Implement purchaseItem, confirmDelivery, cancelPurchase, and rateUser with EnigCredit transfers.

tasks.title: Compile escrow code
tasks.desc: Run forge build; resolve compiler errors in the escrow and ratings slice.

tasks.title: Revise escrow logic
tasks.desc: Tighten re-entrancy guards, dispute timeout, and rating bounds after review.

tasks.title: Deploy Marketplace (escrow)
tasks.desc: Deploy full Marketplace.sol with escrow active; run end-to-end purchase flow.

tasks.title: Test EscrowTest
tasks.desc: Write and run EscrowTest; cover purchase, delivery, cancellation, and rating scenarios.

tasks.title: Document escrow module
tasks.desc: Complete docs/escrow-module.md with state-machine diagram and function reference.

tasks.title: Present Escrow + Ratings
tasks.desc: Record a 3-minute demo of the full escrow flow and prepare slides.

tasks.title: Plan Reputation slice
tasks.desc: Define rating rules (1–5, once per completed sale) and how Reputation reads Marketplace state.

tasks.title: Design Reputation.sol
tasks.desc: Design the rating ledger, AlreadyRated guard, and getAverageRating(total,count) interface.

tasks.title: Implement rateUser
tasks.desc: Implement rateUser(listingId, rating) reading Marketplace.getListing to verify the completed sale.

tasks.title: Compile reputation code
tasks.desc: Run forge build; resolve compiler errors and warnings in the reputation slice.

tasks.title: Revise reputation logic
tasks.desc: Apply review feedback; tighten rating bounds, buyer-only and Status.Sold checks.

tasks.title: Deploy Reputation to Anvil
tasks.desc: Deploy Reputation.sol to Anvil wired to Marketplace; verify rateUser works after a sale.

tasks.title: Test ReputationTest
tasks.desc: Write and run ReputationTest; cover rate-after-sold, double-rate, non-buyer, bad-rating, and unsold reverts.

tasks.title: Document reputation module
tasks.desc: Complete docs/reputation-module.md with function reference and rating rules.

tasks.title: Present Reputation / Ratings
tasks.desc: Record a 3-minute demo of the rating flow and prepare slides.
